Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./src/config/db'\); p.query\(\\"ALTER TABLE inventory ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_restock TIMESTAMP\\"\).then\(async\(\)=>{const r=await p.query\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='inventory' AND column_name='last_restock'\\"\); console.log\('migration applied. column exists:', r.rows.length===1\); process.exit\(0\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('ERR:',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./src/config/db'\); \(async\(\)=>{ try { await p.query\('CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS unaccent'\); const r=await p.query\(\\"SELECT unaccent\('Analgésicos'\) AS u\\"\); console.log\('unaccent OK ->', r.rows[0].u\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\('unaccent FAILED ->', e.message\); } process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./src/config/db'\); \(async\(\)=>{try{await p.query\('ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_login TIMESTAMP'\); const r=await p.query\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='users' AND column_name='last_login'\\"\); console.log\('migration applied. last_login exists:', r.rows.length===1\); process.exit\(0\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('ERR:',e.message\);process.exit\(1\);}}\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const sharp=require\('sharp'\); const svg='<svg xmlns=\\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\\" width=\\"120\\" height=\\"60\\"><rect width=\\"120\\" height=\\"60\\" fill=\\"#fff\\"/><rect x=\\"4\\" y=\\"10\\" width=\\"80\\" height=\\"16\\" fill=\\"#F15A29\\"/><text x=\\"4\\" y=\\"50\\" font-size=\\"12\\" fill=\\"#1A1F2E\\">Hola</text></svg>'; sharp\(Buffer.from\(svg\)\).png\(\).toBuffer\(\).then\(b=>{console.log\('sharp SVG OK, png bytes:', b.length\); process.exit\(0\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('sharp SVG FAIL:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./src/config/db'\);\(async\(\)=>{try{await p.query\(\\"ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_attempts INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS locked_until TIMESTAMP NULL\\"\);const r=await p.query\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='users' AND column_name IN \('failed_attempts','locked_until'\) ORDER BY column_name\\"\);console.log\('migration applied. cols:',r.rows.map\(x=>x.column_name\).join\(', '\)\);process.exit\(0\)}catch\(e\){console.error\('ERR',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}}\)\(\)")

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "--- port 3000 ---"; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 | Measure-Object\).Count)

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($p\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "PID $\($p.OwningProcess\) | $\($proc.ProcessName\) | started $\($proc.StartTime\)" } else { Write-Output "No listener on 3000" })
